user.title: Set up Medication Tracker
user.description: Create a medication tracker instance. You can add medications after setup via the Configure button.

abort.already_configured: This tracker name is already configured.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure when and how you are notified about medications.

data.due_enabled: Alert when a dose is due
data.overdue_enabled: Repeat reminder every N minutes until taken or skipped
data.overdue_max_repeats: Stop repeating after this many reminders
data.due_soon_enabled: Alert when a dose is due soon
data.taken_enabled: Confirm when a dose is marked taken
data.low_stock_enabled: Alert when stock is running low

notification_due_message.title: Due now message template
notification_due_message.description:
Customise the message sent when a dose is due.

**Notification Sounds** — iOS and Android control sound differently, so each has its own options below. ⚠️ iOS Critical bypasses mute and Do Not Disturb, but only works once you've granted the Home Assistant app "Critical Alerts" permission in iOS Settings → Notifications → Home Assistant. Android Critical routes to a dedicated "Critical Medication" channel — Android locks a channel's sound/importance the first time it's created, so adjust it afterward in your phone's own notification settings if needed.

data.due_ios_sound_name: iOS — Time-sensitive sound name (used only when set to Time-sensitive above)
data.due_android_importance: Android — Channel importance (used only when set to Critical above)

notification_overdue_message.title: Overdue message template
notification_overdue_message.description:
Customise the message sent when a dose is overdue.

**Notification Sounds** — iOS and Android control sound differently, so each has its own options below. ⚠️ iOS Critical bypasses mute and Do Not Disturb, but only works once you've granted the Home Assistant app "Critical Alerts" permission in iOS Settings → Notifications → Home Assistant. Android Critical routes to a dedicated "Critical Medication" channel — Android locks a channel's sound/importance the first time it's created, so adjust it afterward in your phone's own notification settings if needed.

data.overdue_ios_sound_name: iOS — Time-sensitive sound name (used only when set to Time-sensitive above)
data.overdue_android_importance: Android — Channel importance (used only when set to Critical above)

notification_due_soon_message.title: Due soon message template
notification_due_soon_message.description:
Customise the message sent when a dose is due soon.

**Notification Sounds** — iOS and Android control sound differently, so each has its own options below. ⚠️ iOS Critical bypasses mute and Do Not Disturb, but only works once you've granted the Home Assistant app "Critical Alerts" permission in iOS Settings → Notifications → Home Assistant. Android Critical routes to a dedicated "Critical Medication" channel — Android locks a channel's sound/importance the first time it's created, so adjust it afterward in your phone's own notification settings if needed.

data.due_soon_ios_sound_name: iOS — Time-sensitive sound name (used only when set to Time-sensitive above)
data.due_soon_android_importance: Android — Channel importance (used only when set to Critical above)

notification_taken_message.title: Taken confirmation message template
notification_taken_message.description:
Customise the message sent when a dose is marked as taken.

**Notification Sounds** — iOS and Android control sound differently, so each has its own options below. ⚠️ iOS Critical bypasses mute and Do Not Disturb, but only works once you've granted the Home Assistant app "Critical Alerts" permission in iOS Settings → Notifications → Home Assistant. Android Critical routes to a dedicated "Critical Medication" channel — Android locks a channel's sound/importance the first time it's created, so adjust it afterward in your phone's own notification settings if needed.

data.taken_ios_sound_name: iOS — Time-sensitive sound name (used only when set to Time-sensitive above)
data.taken_android_importance: Android — Channel importance (used only when set to Critical above)

notification_low_stock_message.title: Low stock message template
notification_low_stock_message.description:
Customise the message sent when a medication's stock runs low. You can use {stock} to show the remaining quantity.

**Notification Sounds** — iOS and Android control sound differently, so each has its own options below. ⚠️ iOS Critical bypasses mute and Do Not Disturb, but only works once you've granted the Home Assistant app "Critical Alerts" permission in iOS Settings → Notifications → Home Assistant. Android Critical routes to a dedicated "Critical Medication" channel — Android locks a channel's sound/importance the first time it's created, so adjust it afterward in your phone's own notification settings if needed.

data.low_stock_ios_sound_name: iOS — Time-sensitive sound name (used only when set to Time-sensitive above)
data.low_stock_android_importance: Android — Channel importance (used only when set to Critical above)

notification_per_medication.title: Per-medication overrides
notification_per_medication.description: Select a medication to configure individual notification settings.

notification_med_overrides.title: Overrides for {medication}
notification_med_overrides.description: Toggle notifications for this medication. These override the global settings above.

add_medication_scheduled.title: Scheduled times
add_medication_scheduled.description: Set the times and days this medication should be taken.

data.days: Days (mon, tue, wed… or leave blank for every day)
data.stock_low_threshold: Alert when stock falls to or below

add_medication_as_needed.title: As-needed limits
add_medication_as_needed.description: Set the dosing limits for this as-needed medication.

data.stock_low_threshold: Alert when stock falls to or below

edit_medication_scheduled.title: Scheduled times
edit_medication_scheduled.description: Edit the times and days this medication should be taken.

data.days: Days (mon, tue, wed… or leave blank for every day)
data.stock_low_threshold: Alert when stock falls to or below

edit_medication_as_needed.description: Edit the dosing limits for this as-needed medication.

error.invalid_time_format: Invalid time format. Use HH:MM, comma-separated (e.g. 08:00, 20:00).
error.invalid_day_format: Invalid day format. Use mon/tue/wed/thu/fri/sat/sun, comma-separated.
